Alert Description: One or more storage sensors on the host are reporting problems. Specific details should be available in the symptom details. For more information, check the Hardware Status of the host in vSphere Client.

Alert ID: 2461f427-bda0-4870-aca1-2ae0bd4bff08

Alert Impact: health

Alert Name: Storage sensors are reporting problems - IBM

Alert Subtype: Availability

Alert Type: Hardware (OSI)

Cancel Date: Unavailable

Control State: Open

Criticality: critical

Host Name: vrops-data02

Alert Link: https://172.21.2.53/vcf-operations/ui/inventory;mode=hierarchy;resourceId=eb8f2c32-60af-4f8d-af67-ed753529d4e1;tab=alerts-and-symptoms;subTab=alerts;entityId=2461f427-bda0-4870-aca1-2ae0bd4bff08

Notification Rule Description: 

Notification Rule Name: PD: Storage sensors are reporting problems

Object Efficiency State: 1.0

Object Health State: 4.0

Object Risk State: 1.0

Product: none

Recommendations: Runbook: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/vrops_sev2_alerts.html#storage-sensors-are-reporting-problems |
 Change or replace the hardware, if necessary. Contact the hardware vendor for assistance. After the problem is resolved, the alert will be canceled when the sensor that reported the problem indicates that the problem no longer exists.

Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/vrops_sev2_alerts.html#storage-sensors-are-reporting-problems
